record.text:
The Chariot 💀🔮 

The bones carry the ink of psychic echoes, a skeleton-scrapped engine driven by the tide of lost, chaotic self. To ride The Chariot is to face the inevitable, traversing the dream-dust between what was and what must be.

#AIart #synthart #AIイラスト

images.alt:
A hyperdetailed, antique lithograph depicting an esoteric tarot card titled 'The Chariot.' The central figure is a surreal, biomechanical chariot constructed from bleached bones, flowing black occult ink, and translucent anatomical fragments. This powerful vehicle moves across a desolate, mystical landscape rendered in muted earthy tones—ochre, umber, and terracotta. The chariot is propelled not by horses, but by visible, energetic streaks and chaotic patterns representing an invisible psychic force. The composition is framed by intricate, elaborate antique borders, with a detailed, ominous human skull placed prominently in each of the four corners, completing the visceral, prophetic scene. The artwork is designed in the deep, visionary style of Austin Osman Spare.

Keywords: Tarot, Esoteric, Occult, Surrealism, Biomechanical, Chariot, Lithograph, Etching, Austin Osman Spare, Visionary Art

promptshare:
A majestic Timber Wolf stands poised on a high, rocky overhang overlooking the geothermal basin of Yellowstone. The scene is set at deep night, illuminated only by a brilliant full moon. The wolf is quiet and observant, contrasted against the sheer spectacle: a massive eruption from Old Faithful. Towering pillars of superheated steam and mineral vapor are dramatically backlit by the luminous full moon, catching the edges of the plumes and giving them an ethereal, glowing quality. The deep canyon and surrounding hot springs are shrouded in deep shadows and misty blues. Style: National Geographic photography, high contrast, cinematic nocturnal portrait, deep saturation on the moonlight, ethereal glowing mist, Shot with an 85mm lens, deep depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, 8K, ultra-detailed fur texture.
